mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (title, content, author_nickname, thumbnail_url, region, duration) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorNickname}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{region}, #{duration})
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_likes WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND username = #{username}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM board_likes WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND username = #{username}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
UPDATE board SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
